pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in the prompt instructions, export_result.sh sqlite query for '%check.torproject.org%', and the VLM prompt in verifier.py.
Explicitly requested in task description and evaluated by the VLM prompt in verifier.py checking for exactly 'SYSTEM COMPROMISED'.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to navigate to the live site https://check.torproject.org/, modify the DOM heading to read 'SYSTEM COMPROMISED', and save the screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/threat_exhibit.png. These requirements are strictly enforced by the task instructions, export scripts, and the VLM verifier prompt.
